---
name: 💡 Feature Request / 功能建议
about: 提出新功能或改进建议 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 功能描述 / Feature Description

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望添加的功能 / A clear description of the feature you'd like -->

## 🎯 使用场景 / Use Case

<!-- 描述这个功能在什么场景下会用到 / Describe the scenario where this feature would be used -->

**例如：**
- 当我在创作...时 / When I'm creating...
- 我需要能够... / I need to be able to...
- 这样可以帮助... / This would help...

## 🔄 当前的替代方案 / Current Workaround

<!-- 你现在如何解决这个问题？/ How do you currently work around this? -->

## 📝 建议的实现方式 / Suggested Implementation

<!-- 如果你有具体的实现想法，请描述 / If you have ideas on how to implement this -->

## 📸 参考示例 / Reference Examples

<!-- 如果有其他应用的类似功能，可以附上截图或链接 / Screenshots or links to similar features in other apps -->

## ✨ 预期收益 / Expected Benefits

<!-- 这个功能会带来什么好处？ / What benefits would this feature bring? -->

- 提高效率 / Improved efficiency
- 更好的用户体验 / Better user experience
- 支持新的工作流 / Support new workflows
- 其他... / Other...

## 🔄 附加信息 / Additional Context

<!-- 添加任何其他相关信息 / Add any other context about the feature request -->
